prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-GOLDPANKIT-21PC-BUN Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 21pc Lightweight Gold Sluice Box and Gold Prospecting Equipment Tools Kit Description: Take your gold hunting to the next level with the ASR Outdoor 21pc Lightweight Sluice Box and Gold Prospecting Kit—a complete, ready-to-go setup built for serious prospectors and ambitious beginners alike. Designed for portability and performance, this all-in-one kit gives you the tools you need to dig, sift, separate, and collect gold efficiently in the field.

At the heart of the kit is a 32" lightweight ABS plastic sluice box, engineered with multiple riffles to help trap fine gold while allowing lighter materials to wash away. Pair it with the included 8", 10", and 12" dual riffle gold pans to process material at every stage - from rough sorting to fine gold recovery.

The 23" tri-fold steel shovel and 12.5" high-visibility orange scoop make collecting paydirt fast and efficient, whether you're working riverbanks, creeks, or gravel beds. Once you’ve concentrated your material, the 8lb magnetic black sand pickup tool helps remove unwanted magnetic sands with ease, improving visibility and gold recovery.

For precision work, the kit includes a 3oz snifter bottle to capture fine gold flakes and a 10x magnification loupe to inspect your finds up close. Store your discoveries securely with 12 included 3/4 dram collection vials, perfect for organizing and transporting your gold.

Lightweight, compact, and field-ready, this kit is ideal for gold panning, sluicing, creek prospecting, and outdoor adventures. Whether you're chasing your first flakes or expanding your setup, the ASR Outdoor 21pc Kit delivers everything you need in one powerful bundle. Search Terms: gold prospecting kit, sluice box kit, gold panning kit, gold mining equipment, gold sluice box portable, gold pans set, black sand magnet tool, snifter bottle gold, gold collection vials, prospecting shovel, beginner gold mining kit, gold recovery tools Features: - COMPLETE 21PC GOLD PROSPECTING KIT - All-in-one set includes sluice box, gold pans, shovel, scoop, magnet tool, snifter bottle, loupe, and 12 collection vials for a full gold recovery workflow. - 32” LIGHTWEIGHT SLUICE BOX WITH RIFFLES - Durable ABS construction with multiple riffles designed to trap fine gold while allowing lighter sediment to wash away efficiently. - 3 DUAL RIFFLE GOLD PANS (8”, 10”, 12”) - Process material in stages with three sizes for improved gold separation and recovery in any prospecting environment. - DIG, COLLECT & SEPARATE WITH EASE - Includes 23" tri-fold steel shovel and 12.5" high-visibility scoop for efficient digging and material collection in the field. - PRECISION GOLD RECOVERY TOOLS - 8lb black sand magnet removes unwanted material, while the snifter bottle, 10x loupe, and 12 vials help collect, inspect, and store your gold. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 21pc Gold Sluice Box and Prospecting Kit

tokens.name: Gold Sluice Box and Prospecting Kit

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 21pc Gold Sluice Box Prospecting Kit

anthropic.title_differentiation: 32 Inch Sluice Box, Three Gold Pans, Black Sand Magnet, Snifter Bottle, 10X Loupe, 12 Collection Vials

openai.title_differentiation: 3 Gold Pans, Tri-Fold Shovel, High Visibility Scoop, Black Sand Magnet, Snifter Bottle, Loupe, 12 Vials
